body.title: Fix broken [REDACTED-CREDENTIAL] after import rewrite
body.intention: I intend that the test suite runs clean without a spurious ModuleNotFoundError from a deleted module.
body.description:
test_datacenter_mcp_wrapper.py imports 'datacenter_mcp' which was deleted in d5d8ea11 (T-igor-import-rewrite). The test has been failing since that commit.

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_datacenter_mcp_wrapper.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Update the test import to the new module path, or delete the test if the module was intentionally retired. Out of scope: changing production code.
**Completion criteria:** `python -m pytest tests/igor/test_datacenter_mcp_wrapper.py -x -q` exits 0.
